zh.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart於大約1625年出生。他於1654年與Anne Winchurst在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可紐波利被列為shipwright。他去世於1717年8月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利享年93歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可勞利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart于大约1625年出生。他于1654年与Anne Winchurst在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在美国马萨诸塞州艾可紐波利被列为shipwright。他去世于1717年8月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利享年93岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可勞利。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart was born about 1625. He married Anne Winchurst in 1654, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as shipwright in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United States. He died on 30 August 1717, in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 93, and was buried in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart est né environ 1625. Il a épousé Anne Winchurst en 1654, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est shipwright à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 30 août 1717, à Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart wurde um 1625 geboren. Er hat 1654 in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Anne Winchurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als shipwright in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. August 1717 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart è nato il circa 1625. Lui sposato Anne Winchurst nel 1654, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come shipwright nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 30 agosto 1717, nel Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewartは約1625年に生まれた。1654年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでAnne Winchurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスニューブリーでの職業はshipwrightと記録されている。彼は1717年8月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスロウリーで93歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスロウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart(은)는 대략 1625년 태어났다. 그는 1654년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 Anne Winchurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 뉴버이에서 shipwright이었다. 그는 1717년 8월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 로우리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart nasceu aproximadamente 1625. Ele casou-se com Anne Winchurst em 1654, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como shipwright em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1717, em Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart родился около 1625 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Winchurst в 1654 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии shipwright в местности нюбури, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 30 августа 1717 г. в местности роули, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности роули, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Duncan Stewart nació aproximadamente 1625. Se casó con Anne Winchurst en 1654, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era shipwright en Newbury, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1717, en Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Rowley, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
